'''Phemis''' was a backwater [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], within the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]. Phemis was the only planet where [[rubat]] [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]], a type of [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|kyber crystal]], could be found. The crystal was historically used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to craft [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. Phemis was only sparsely inhabited, due to its harsh terrain. Overall, the planet only had a population of approximately ten thousand, largely made up of mining settlements and a military garrison.

{{Planet-stub}}

==History==
[[File:Final_Fight_on_Phemis_HD.png|thumb|left|200px|A trio of Force-sensitives make their stand on Phemis.]]
Phemis was first discovered by [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] explorers early in the history of the Old Republic. However, the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] had long mined the region for [[rubat]] [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]], and had the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] declare the crystals a protected resource, limiting future colonization and mining efforts. During the age of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the ban was reaffirmed and possession of the crystals was made illegal, but not because of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].<ref name="Hidden Depths" />
